Module io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.prometheus.core
Package io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.prometheus.database

Interface PrometheusTableInstancePlus<T extends PrometheusDataItem>

Type Parameters:
T - the DataType
All Superinterfaces:

public interface PrometheusTableInstancePlus<T extends PrometheusDataItem> extends PrometheusTableInstance<T>
Table interface.
